name: Kaspr

auth.notes: Official help article shows an API key in the Authorization header. Community examples sometimes use Bearer; verify exact current header/version requirements before implementation.

rateLimits: Plan-based limits exist, but exact requests per hour/day are not public in the agent-retrievable docs found.
pagination: Unknown. Public docs found describe LinkedIn-profile and CSV enrichment but do not expose complete endpoint-level pagination semantics.
notes: Keep needs-review: official marketing/help pages confirm API access and a sample endpoint, but complete machine-readable API reference, rate limits, and pagination were not retrievable.
The official help article says the API is compatible with standard LinkedIn profile URLs and not Sales Navigator URLs.
Credits are consumed for B2B emails, direct emails, phone numbers, and successful API/export calls.
reviewReason: Exact blocker: public sources do not expose a complete agent-readable API reference/OpenAPI, full endpoint list, exact current auth version/header requirements, exact requests-per-hour/day limits, or pagination semantics. The linked Stoplight reference is JavaScript-only from the available fetch path.
